file_summary: This file contains pytest tests for encoding utilities in the itsdangerous library. It tests functions for byte conversion, base64 encoding/decoding, and integer-byte conversions with various parameterized test cases.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire test file. It includes all imports, test function definitions, and test logic. Lines 1-6 import the encoding functions and BadData exception. Lines 8-10 define test_want_bytes, which tests the want_bytes function with string and byte inputs. Lines 13-17 define test_base64, which tests base64 encoding and decoding with Unicode and byte inputs. Lines 20-22 define test_base64_bad, which tests that invalid base64 input raises BadData. Lines 25-36 define test_int_bytes, which parameterizes integer-to-byte conversions for edge cases like zero, a single-byte value, and a large 64-bit integer.
